hero.headline: Follow me to see the world from a new perspective

seo.title: Cinematic FPV Drone Videography
seo.description: FPV drone filmmaker capturing the world from a new perspective. Cinematic aerial videography for brands, events, and productions.
seo.ogImageAlt: FPV drone in flight over mountain landscape

drones.name: DJI Avata 2
drones.description: Fast, powerful and safe drone with 4K filming, for indoor or outdoor shots. RAW filming with 10-bit D-Log M color, gyroscopic stabilization for high-quality cinematic recordings.

drones.name: DJI Neo
drones.description: Super compact, versatile and safe, even for shots with children. Autonomous pursuit mode, stabilized mode, and connections to multiple controls. Ideal for extremely tight spaces.

drones.name: Happymodel Mobula7
drones.description: Also known as "el modelo japi". It was my first FPV drone. It had so many upgrades that none of its original parts remain — it's a completely different beast. So... is it the same drone? Who are we? Why do we exist?

drones.name: iFlight Cidora SL5-E
drones.description: A roaring beast that can break necks. Ideal for high-speed vehicle chasing. Top speed: 170 km/h.

drones.name: iFlight Nazgul5 V2
drones.description: High-power drone built to take hard hits. Ideal for extreme acrobatic shots. Top speed: 160 km/h.

drones.name: JJR/C Sol
drones.description: Foldable to the size and shape of a phone. Wi-Fi camera control. "Don't tell anyone I have a drone in my pocket or they'll kick me out of the birthday party".

drones.name: Red Helicopter
drones.description: A great Peruvian helicopter for flying over any environment and scaring the elders. It is recommended not to have papers on the table. It is red.

categories.title: Events
categories.description: Festivals, gatherings, fairs, marathons, concerts, outdoors or indoors. Hikes, trekking, weddings, birthdays, and all kinds of celebrations.

categories.title: People
categories.description: Safe proximity flights around people. Workers performing activities. Yoga, meditation, mountaineering, extreme sports, and all kinds of outdoor activities.

categories.title: Vehicles
categories.description: Bicycles, motorcycles, cars, light aircraft, construction or agricultural equipment. High-speed chase shots. Race and sports event coverage.

categories.title: Properties
categories.description: Home and office tours, with or without people. Exterior-to-interior transitions through doors and windows. Art exhibitions and museums. Construction progress tracking. Visual inspection of tall or hard-to-access structures.

categories.title: Landscapes
categories.description: Mountains, ranches, ponds, wildlife. Horse riding, camping, and excursions. Showcasing tourist destinations with stunning natural beauty.
